default_timeout.description: Default timeout for gate commands in seconds. Defaults to 300.

evaluator_model.description: Default model for the evaluator subprocess. Defaults to `"sonnet"`.

evaluator_retries.description: Maximum retries for transient evaluator subprocess failures. Defaults to 1.

evaluator_timeout.description: Evaluator subprocess timeout in seconds. Defaults to 120.

max_history.description:
Maximum number of run history files to retain per spec.
When set, oldest files beyond this limit are pruned on each save.
A value of `0` means unlimited (no pruning). Defaults to `None` (no pruning).
